description: MA DPH: General operating rooms minimum 400 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Massachusetts.
citation: 105 CMR 130.000 / Massachusetts Department of Public Health

description: MA DPH: Single-bed patient room minimum 130 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 110 sq ft per patient.
MA DPH: ICU cubicle minimum 200 sq ft clear; open-bay ICU minimum 150 sq ft per patient.
MA DPH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 130 sq ft per treatment space; dedicated resuscitation bay minimum 250 sq ft.
MA DPH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
MA DPH: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
MA DPH: Determination of Need (DoN) required from MA DPH for new hospital construction, equipment, and services. Massachusetts DoN is equivalent to Certificate of Need.
citation: M.G.L. c.111 §25C — Massachusetts Determination of Need

description: MA DPH: All new hospital construction and major renovation (>$15M threshold) requires MA DPH plan review and approval.
